title: Groups
subtitle: Find community spaces, join discussions, and collaborate with members.
leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave this group?

detail.eventsSubtitle: Upcoming events linked to this group.

files.title: Group files
files.subtitle: Documents and resources shared with group members.

media.title: Group media
media.subtitle: Photos and videos shared with group members.

media.joinToView: Join this group to view media.
media.deleteMessage: Delete this media item from the group?
media.deleteError: Could not delete the media item.
media.permissionMessage: Allow photo library access to share group media.

qa.title: Group Q&A
qa.subtitle: Ask practical questions and share answers with members.
qa.validation: Add a question title and details before publishing.
qa.empty: No questions have been asked yet.

wiki.title: Group wiki
wiki.subtitle: Build a shared knowledge base for this group.

wiki.pageLoadError: Could not load this wiki page.

tasks.title: Group tasks
tasks.subtitle: Organise shared work and keep track of progress.
tasks.validation: Add a task title before saving.
tasks.empty: No tasks have been created yet.

analytics.title: Group analytics
analytics.subtitle: Monitor membership, engagement, and content performance.
analytics.adminOnly: Only group admins can view analytics.
analytics.empty: No analytics are available for this group yet.

marketplace.title: Group marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse listings from members of this group.

marketplace.empty: No marketplace listings from this group yet.
marketplace.loadFailed: Could not load group marketplace listings.
marketplace.loadMoreFailed: Could not load more group marketplace listings.

create.title: Create Group
create.subtitle: Start a community space for discussions, updates, and shared activity.
create.imageHint: Add a recognisable image for this group.
create.imageTypeError: Choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
create.imagePickFailedDescription: We could not open your photo library.
create.imageUploadFailedDescription: The group was saved, but the image could not be uploaded.
create.coordinatesHint: Optional coordinates help maps and nearby group discovery place this group accurately.
create.reviewSubtitle: Check the group name, visibility, location, and federation listing before creating it.
create.validationRequired: Add a group name and description before continuing.
create.validationNameLength: Use 3 to 100 characters for the group name.
create.validationDescriptionLength: Use 20 to 2000 characters for the group description.
create.invalidCoordinates: Enter both latitude and longitude using valid coordinate ranges.
create.loadFailed: We could not load the group details. Please try again.
create.saveFailedDescription: We could not save the group. Please try again.
create.failedDescription: We could not create the group. Please try again.
